params.name: Chenxiang Wood
params.description: This item was left behind by Liu Yanchang, Chenxiang's father, who died soon after Saint Mother gave birth to Chenxiang. Although this item was not a powerful treasure, it gave Chenxiang his name and was also a keepsake of his father.
